mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.`name`, u1.`name` AS 'createUser', a.create_time AS 'createTime', u2.`name` AS 'updateUser', a.update_time AS 'updateTime' FROM a_project a LEFT JOIN `sys_user` u1 ON u1.`id` = a.`create_user` LEFT JOIN `sys_user` u2 ON u2.`id` = a.`update_user` WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT a.id, a.`name`, u1.`name` AS 'createUser', a.create_time AS 'createTime', u2.`name` AS 'updateUser', a.update_time AS 'updateTime' FROM a_project a LEFT JOIN `sys_user` u1 ON u1.`id` = a.`create_user` LEFT JOIN `sys_user` u2 ON u2.`id` = a.`update_user` WHERE a.del_flag = 0
AND a.`name` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{name},'%')
ORDER BY a.id DESC
